Full Prompt:
Photorealistic cinematic film still, 16:9 horizontal, 8K, sharp focus, professional industrial photography lighting, soft even near-shadowless light.
Mood: serene, precise, minimalist, high-end industrial future, with a warm undertone.
Setting: a modern suspended-ceiling cleanroom factory (有吊顶的无尘车间). Recognizable DNA: a polished glossy grey epoxy floor with painted yellow safety boundary lines, vertical brushed stainless steel cleanroom wall panels (不锈钢墙板), a flat white cleanroom suspended ceiling (有吊顶的无尘车间吊顶) with flush-mounted LED panel lights, and clean rectangular pillars. Realistic production machinery: a high-rise Spinning Line Platform (纺丝平台, 中空纤维线) with extruder machines and a rotating winding reel (收丝轮) wound with fine white hollow-fiber membrane filaments (中空纤维膜丝束), a Spiral-Wound/Flat-Sheet Membrane Line (卷膜线/平板膜线) with roll wrapping fixtures, a chemical Membrane Modification Area (膜丝改性) featuring stainless steel pipes, control cabinets, and a long row of white plastic liquid troughs, and a Flux Testing (通量测试) workbench with water lines and high-end cylindrical filter cartridges.

The physical world stays realistic (brushed stainless steel, grey epoxy, white plastic troughs, white membrane fibers); color highlights appear inside the XR layer..
